name: Terraform AWS Infrastructure
description: Define AWS production infrastructure with Terraform. Creates VPC with public/private subnets, ECS Fargate cluster, RDS PostgreSQL (Multi-AZ), Application Load Balancer, ACM certificate, and ECR registry.

steps.description: Create Terraform root module with AWS provider and required_version constraints
Create VPC module: 2 AZs, public subnets (ALB), private subnets (ECS, RDS), NAT Gateway
Create ECS Fargate cluster, task definition, service with auto-scaling on CPU/memory
Create RDS PostgreSQL 16, Multi-AZ, automated backups (7 days), encrypted storage
Create ALB with HTTPS listener (ACM cert), HTTP→HTTPS redirect, and target group health checks
Define variables: environment, region, app_name, db_instance_class, min/max_capacity

steps.expect: Plan: N to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy
